title: Portuguese Creamy Pudding Custard
description: A traditional Portuguese dessert made creamy with cashew pudding. Rich and comforting, perfect for special occasions.
instructions: In a blender, blend soaked cashews with water until smooth.
In a saucepan, combine sugar, custard powder, and a pinch of salt. Whisk until well combined.
Gradually add the blended cashew mixture to the saucepan and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and vanilla extract.
Temper the egg mixture by slowly pouring the warm cashew mixture into the eggs, whisking continuously.
Pour the mixture into individual ramekins or a large baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until set.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
Serve cold, garnished with a sprinkle of cinnamon or nutmeg if desired.
